title: Request for Production of Records: Special Consideration Petition #1442942 - Young Jin Jung (Santa Monica College)

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the California Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

Dear Mr. Myers and SMC Records Department,

Under the Family Educational Rights and Privacy Act (FERPA) and the California Public Records Act (CPRA), I am formally requesting the immediate and unredacted production of the following educational and administrative records associated with my student identity:

System Activity Logs: All logs and activity history regarding Special Consideration Petition by student Jung, Young Jin SID#1442942 from 2019 to 2024.

Administrative Communications: All correspondence, internal memos, and electronic messages involving Esau Tovar and other relevant staff regarding the deliberation and outcome of the Special Consideration Petition filed by student Jung, Young Jin (SID #1442942).

Ombudsperson Files: All records of my formal requests to the Ombudsperson’s office and all subsequent internal communications between the Ombudsperson and SMC staff regarding my case.

Regarding Privacy: As the primary subject of these records, I am entitled to the full content. Any redactions of third-party information must be accompanied by a specific legal citation justifying why the information cannot be disclosed to the student involved.

I expect a formal response or the production of these records within 10 days. Failure to produce these records will be documented for further legal and administrative escalation.

Sincerely,

Young Jin Jung

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 calendar days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Young Jin Jung
